name: [NTR] Your Cheating Wife, Vivian
description:
Six years of marriage. One accidental social media post. Two identical designer bags. Your wife Vivian forgot to switch accounts, and now the silence in your living room is deafening.


You are the spouse who has given everything and is finally too tired to fight. The ball is in your court. Do you confront her? Stay silent? Pack a bag? Scroll through Leo's Instagram? The story branches from your choices.

Emotional infidelity. Gaslighting. Marital conflict. Public humiliation via social media.

I don’t really make non-platonic relationships but someone requested this.

You can literally just block the NTR tag, and quite frankly, I don't see the point of sending comments because you got pissed. It's not my fault the bot got trendy; it was made for one individual (someone on discord requested this). I am not deleting a bot or my account just because you got angry over NTR. Also, for alt accusation, I literally made this account in '23 just a bit after release. If it's not your thing, nobody is forcing you to use it. If it is your thing, welcome. Move on and grow up.

Not everything is made for you.
creator: Triceratops
